title: Silky Zingy Malaysian Mentaiko Noodles
description: A keto-friendly, silky, and winey Malaysian dish featuring mentaiko, shio-koji-cure, and a light, refreshing taste.
instructions: Cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions. Rinse the noodles with cold water and set aside.
Slice the shio-koji-brined salmon into thin strips.
Heat the toasted sesame oil in a pan over medium heat and sauté the green chili sambal for 1-2 minutes.
Add the sliced salmon to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes, until cooked through.
Add the cooked noodles, fish sauce, and lime juice to the pan and toss to combine.
Stir in the mentaiko and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until heated through.
Garnish with chopped green onions and serve immediately.
Garnish with toasted sesame seeds and serve immediately, if desired.
